Takes place post-timeskip! Tamaki is 26 and a pro hero sidekick. Possible spoilers!

Empty initial message (for now), so you can create your own scenarios! Just make sure to state what is going on within brackets [ ] in your first message so it works!

If the bot messes up, my apologies, but that's how the AI do be.

(I'll possibly make an initial message when I'm no longer ill, but for now, please make do with how it is currently! 😔)
